import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"查询自动化列表"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/automations"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



查询自动化列表

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"in":"query","name":"definitionType","required":false,"description":"自动化定义类型过滤集合（仅用于列表查询过滤）。支持 SCRIPT_JSON、SCRIPT_TEXT、WHEN_IF_THEN、LEGACY_FLOW、LEGACY_LINKAGE、OTHER。URL 示例：definitionType=SCRIPT_JSON,LEGACY_FLOW 或 definitionType=SCRIPT_JSON&definitionType=LEGACY_FLOW。不传或空值时查询全部类型。创建自动化仅支持 SCRIPT_JSON；编辑自动化中 name/enabled 支持所有可识别自动化类型，config 仅支持 SCRIPT_JSON","schema":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string","enum":["SCRIPT_JSON","SCRIPT_TEXT","WHEN_IF_THEN","LEGACY_FLOW","LEGACY_LINKAGE","OTHER"]}},"style":"form","explode":true},{"in":"query","name":"orderBy","required":false,"description":"排序方式","schema":{"type":"string","default":"createTime asc","enum":["createTime asc","createTime desc"]},"example":"createTime asc"},{"in":"query","name":"pageNum","required":false,"schema":{"type":"integer","default":1}},{"in":"query","name":"pageSize","required":false,"schema":{"type":"integer","default":200}}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
